title: elaphoglossum tovarense
intro: Elaphoglossum tovarense is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known for its delicate, lacy fronds. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Elaphoglossum tovarense has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its potential health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health complaints.
